nde_context: I was in a car crash and thought I was dying.
nde_description: I left my body, saw a bright light, felt overwhelming peace, sensed time stop, became hyper-aware, and crossed a border before returning.
nde_aftereffects: Since then I fear death less, feel deeper purpose, and care more about others and social issues.

nde_context: I collapsed suddenly and everything felt dangerous and chaotic.
nde_description: I felt terrified and confused. I stayed in my body, did not see bright light, and did not feel peace.
nde_aftereffects: Afterward I felt vulnerable and withdrawn, with little spiritual change.

nde_context: I had been ill for months and was frightened, but my family support gave me some hope.
nde_description: At first I panicked, then I felt calm and aware. Time disappeared and I sensed a presence, but no out-of-body state.
nde_aftereffects: I became more compassionate and socially engaged, though not more religious.
